name: Kids' 2pc Bamboo and Melamine Dino Dinnerware Set Pink - Pillowfort™
description: Bring your kid's favorite dino to their dinnerware with the 2-Piece Bamboo and Melamine Dino Dinnerware Set from Pillowfort™. This pink dinnerware set includes a round bowl and a round plate, both with dino-like eyes, nose and spikes detailing for a cute look. Made with bamboo and melamine, this BPA-free dinnerware set is dishwasher safe for easy cleanup.
